ddls:
CREATE TABLE "launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the launch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the launch (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  "launch_service_provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch service provider */,
  "rocket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rocket used */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the launch */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time of the launch */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch site */,
  "launch_pad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch pad */,
  "payload_mass" REAL /* Mass of the payload */,
  "payload_volume" REAL /* Volume of the payload */,
  "launch_window_start" TEXT /* Start time of the launch window */,
  "launch_window_end" TEXT /* End time of the launch window */,
  "crew_size" INTEGER /* Number of crew members */,
  "crew_names" TEXT /* Names of the crew members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_launch_pad_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_pad_id") REFERENCES launch_pads ("launch_pad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_launch_service_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_service_provider_id") REFERENCES launch_service_providers ("launch_service_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_launch_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_site_id") REFERENCES launch_sites ("launch_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_rocket_id FOREIGN KEY ("rocket_id") REFERENCES rockets ("rocket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_service_providers" (
  "launch_service_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch service provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the launch service provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the launch service provider */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the launch service provider is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the launch service provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_service_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rockets" (
  "rocket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rocket */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the rocket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rocket */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the rocket */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the rocket */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the rocket */,
  "payload_capacity" REAL /* Payload capacity of the rocket */,
  "stage_count" INTEGER /* Number of stages in the rocket */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the rocket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rocket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., crewed, uncrewed, satellite) */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the mission */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the mission */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_sites" (
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the launch site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the launch site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the launch site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the launch site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the launch site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the launch site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_pads" (
  "launch_pad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch pad */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch site */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the launch pad */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the launch pad */,
  "launch_count" INTEGER /* Number of launches from the launch pad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_pad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., mission control, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_manifests" (
  "manifest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch manifest */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch the manifest belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the launch manifest */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the launch manifest in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the manifest was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manifest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launch_manifests_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_briefs" (
  "brief_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission brief */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the brief belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the mission brief */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the mission brief in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the brief was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brief_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_briefs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch notification */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., launch success, launch failure) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launch_notifications_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch trend */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch the trend belongs to */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_time" TEXT /* Time when the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., launch success rate, launch failure rate) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launch_trends_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission outcome */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_time" TEXT /* Time when the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., mission success, mission failure) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_outcomes_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_site_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site characteristic */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch site the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_type" TEXT /* Type of characteristic (e.g., launch pad, payload capacity) */,
  "characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the characteristic value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launch_site_characteristics_launch_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_site_id") REFERENCES launch_sites ("launch_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch cost */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch the cost belongs to */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., launch vehicle, payload) */,
  "cost_value" REAL /* Value of the cost */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the cost value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launch_costs_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch the payload belongs to */,
  "payload_name" TEXT /* Name of the payload */,
  "payload_mass" REAL /* Mass of the payload */,
  "payload_volume" REAL /* Volume of the payload */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of payload (e.g., satellite, crewed vehicle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payloads_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_window" (
  "window_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch window */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch the window belongs to */,
  "window_start" TEXT /* Start time of the launch window */,
  "window_end" TEXT /* End time of the launch window */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the launch window */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launch_window_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch the crew member belongs to */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "crew_role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., commander, pilot) */,
  "crew_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)
